name: screenmcp
description: Privacy-first desktop screen capture MCP server
author: ludekvodicka

scripts.test:capture: npm run build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run release:check && npm run third-party:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.package: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.package:dir: npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml --publish never
